# SparkCore Fund Management — Full Content Index

> Complete index of all SparkCore blog articles and resources.

## Blog Articles

- [Why Invest in Crypto Funds? 7 Best Reasons for 2026](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/why-invest-in-crypto-funds-2026): Evidence-based case for crypto fund allocation in 2026 — institutional adoption data, Sharpe ratio backtests, and EU regulatory protections.
- [Estonia vs. Luxembourg vs. Malta for Crypto Funds](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/estonia-luxembourg-malta-crypto-fund): Tax, regulatory, and cost comparison of three EU fund jurisdictions for crypto fund managers in 2026.
- [Sub-Threshold AIFM for Crypto: Thresholds, Benefits, and the Estonia Option](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/sub-threshold-aifm-crypto-estonia): AIFMD Article 3(2) AUM thresholds, Estonia registration timeline and costs, comparison with full AIFMD authorization, and MiCA boundaries for crypto fund managers.
- [What Is a Crypto AIFM](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/what-is-a-crypto-aifm): Legal definition, regulatory functions, and investor protections of an AIFM operating in crypto-asset markets under AIFMD.
- [Crypto Fund vs ETF](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/crypto-fund-vs-etf): Structural comparison of regulated crypto alternative investment funds and exchange-traded products for institutional allocators.
- [Crypto Fund Compliance Guide](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/crypto-fund-compliance-guide): Operational and regulatory compliance framework for crypto fund managers covering AML, custody, valuation, reporting, and regulator-facing controls.
- [What an Alternative Investment Fund Platform Does](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/what-an-alternative-investment-fund-platform-does): How an AIF platform supports regulated crypto funds with compliance infrastructure, custody access, and launch operations.
- [White Label Crypto Fund Platform](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/white-label-crypto-fund-platform): How a white-label crypto fund platform enables third-party managers to launch regulated funds with compliance, banking, and reporting in place.
- [How White Label Funds Launch in Crypto](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/how-white-label-funds-launch-in-crypto): End-to-end walkthrough of how white-label funds are structured, licensed, and operationalised in the crypto-asset space.
- [Low Volatility Crypto Strategy](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/low-volatility-crypto-strategy): How regulated funds target steadier returns in crypto markets through hedging, arbitrage, and disciplined risk controls.
- [Crypto Arbitrage Investment Fund](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/crypto-arbitrage-investment-fund): Market-neutral exposure through controlled arbitrage execution, risk management, and institutional fund structure in crypto markets.
- [What a Market Neutral Crypto Fund Does](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/what-a-market-neutral-crypto-fund-does): How market-neutral crypto funds target returns with limited market beta using hedging, arbitrage, and disciplined risk management.
- [Bitcoin Outperformance Strategy Fund](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/bitcoin-outperformance-strategy-fund): How an actively managed fund targets risk-adjusted outperformance relative to Bitcoin within a regulated institutional structure.
- [What an Institutional Crypto Fund Manager Does](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/what-an-institutional-crypto-fund-manager-does): Regulatory structure, portfolio management responsibilities, and investor due diligence criteria for institutional crypto fund managers.
- [Crypto Fund for Qualified Investors](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/crypto-fund-for-qualified-investors): How regulated crypto funds provide qualified investors with structured access, risk controls, and reporting beyond direct token ownership.
- [Estonian AIFM Crypto Fund](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/estonian-aifm-crypto-fund): How Estonia's AIFMD small fund manager regime supports regulated crypto fund structures for qualified investors.
- [Regulated Crypto Investment Fund](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/regulated-crypto-investment-fund): What regulated status changes for crypto fund investors: oversight, risk controls, and institutional-grade fund structure.
- [Regulated Crypto Fund Manager in Estonia](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/regulated-crypto-fund-manager-estonia): Detailed overview of operating as a regulated crypto fund manager under the AIFM framework supervised by Finantsinspektsioon.
- [How to Launch a Crypto Fund in Estonia](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/how-to-launch-a-crypto-fund-estonia): Step-by-step regulatory and operational guide for establishing a crypto fund under Estonia's AIFMD small fund manager regime.
- [Delta Neutral & Beta Neutral Crypto Strategies](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/delta-neutral-crypto-strategies-explained): How market-neutral, long/short, and quantitative approaches generate uncorrelated returns in digital asset portfolios.
- [White-Label Crypto Fund Manager Services](https://sparkcore.fund/blog/white-label-crypto-fund-manager-services): Regulatory structure, AIFM architecture, and operational scope of white-label crypto fund manager services.

## Articles en français

- [Agents IA et Blockchain : Pourquoi les Rails Décentralisés Sont Nativement Conçus pour l'Économie Agentique](https://sparkcore.fund/fr/blog/agents-ia-blockchain-economie-agentique): Analyse infrastructure de la complémentarité déterministe/probabiliste entre blockchain et agents IA — wallet 2s, stablecoins, spending caps, World ID, bataille x402 / AP2 / Tempo.
- [Stratégies d'Options pour Protéger un Portefeuille Actions](https://sparkcore.fund/fr/blog/strategies-options-protection-portefeuille-actions): Protective put, collar (JHEQX), covered call (JEPI), put spread, tail risk hedging (Universa) et VIX calls — mécanique, coût réel et limites des 6 grandes stratégies de couverture par options.
- [Le Vrai Coût du Market Timing](https://sparkcore.fund/fr/blog/le-vrai-cout-du-market-timing): Données, études (DALBAR, JP Morgan) et stratégies de couverture — pourquoi vendre dans la panique échoue et comment les professionnels gèrent le risque sans quitter le marché.

## Resources

- Fund factsheets (Dynamic Trends, CryptoVision): gated documents, available on request to qualified investors via discovery call.
- [Privacy Policy](https://sparkcore.fund/privacy-policy): GDPR and data protection policy for SparkCore Fund Management (SparkCore.investment OÜ).
